mapper.sql: se.STEP_EXECUTION_ID, se.VERSION, se.STEP_NAME, se.JOB_EXECUTION_ID, se.START_TIME, se.END_TIME, se.STATUS, se.COMMIT_COUNT, se.READ_COUNT, se.FILTER_COUNT, se.WRITE_COUNT, se.EXIT_CODE, se.EXIT_MESSAGE, se.READ_SKIP_COUNT, se.WRITE_SKIP_COUNT, se.PROCESS_SKIP_COUNT, se.ROLLBACK_COUNT, se.LAST_UPDATED
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM BATCH_STEP_EXECUTION se WHERE se.JOB_EXECUTION_ID = #{jobExecutionId} ORDER BY se.STEP_EXECUTION_ID ASC

SELECT , ji.JOB_NAME FROM BATCH_STEP_EXECUTION se JOIN BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION je ON se.JOB_EXECUTION_ID = je.JOB_EXECUTION_ID JOIN BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE ji ON je.JOB_INSTANCE_ID = ji.JOB_INSTANCE_ID WHERE se.STEP_EXECUTION_ID = #{stepExecutionId}
